payload.title: Sync pilot monorepo to template v0.6.2 (copier update)

payload.text: Instrument: truth stats --since 2026-07-12 plus grep of scope_basis overrides. Override rate >~50% of gate firings -> narrow QUANTIFIER_TOKENS/PHRASES; a genuine quantifier/scope divergence that the gate never fired on -> widen scope signals. Decision rule pre-written in ADR-007 Adoption gate; needs pilot traffic, hence the dep.
payload.title: ADR-007 adoption-gate review (due ~2026-08-11)

payload.text: The paper's own prescribed check (section 8 item 2): re-judge a sample of live claims cold, record in a future paper revision. truth stats is the mechanical half; the hand half stays manual by design — it is the check ON the machinery.
